summary: Sync canonical resources with client skill packages.

toolDescription.description:
🧩 SKILLS SYNC: Keep client skills aligned with canonical resources.

ACTIONS: status | export | sync | diff | pull | clone

Use for status checks, reconciliation, drift reporting, and round-trip edits.

frameworkAware.enabled: 🧩 SKILLS SYNC [FRAMEWORK]: Skill sync actions with active methodology context available in surrounding workflow.
frameworkAware.disabled: 🧩 SKILLS SYNC: Skill sync actions without methodology context.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Operation: status (inspect config/manifests), export (write skills), sync (reconcile to registrations with optional prune), diff (show drift and optional .patch output), pull (merge exported prose edits back to canonical YAML), clone (create canonical resources from SKILL.md).

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Target client id. Use one of: claude-code, cursor, codex, opencode, or all.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Output scope for client directories. Default: user.

parameters.name: prune
parameters.description: For sync: when true (default), remove stale managed skills not present in current registrations.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: For export/sync/pull/clone: show planned changes without writing files.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: For diff: write .patch files to this directory instead of stdout only.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: For clone: path to the source SKILL.md file. Required for clone action.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: For clone: target category for prompt resources. Default: general.

parameters.name: preview
parameters.description: For pull: show unified diffs without writing changes.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: For clone: overwrite existing resource directory.

commands.summary: Show sync config and manifest availability.
Reconcile clients to registrations (export/update plus optional prune).
Compare canonical and exported outputs; optional .patch output.
Merge exported prose edits back into canonical YAML.
Create canonical resources from external SKILL.md.
